title: aspidogyne bicornuta
intro: Aspidogyne bicornuta, also known as the two-horned aspidogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Aspidogyne bicornuta is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be applied topically in the form of a paste or ointment.
